languages.text: "Офицер, соберите людей. Сегодня Драйвстемы войдут в историю как единственный род, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}вставший на защиту Даргонуса и фон Валанциусов{/d}".

traits.locale_text: "Офицер, соберите людей. Сегодня Драйвстемы войдут в историю как единственный род, вставший на защиту Даргонуса и фон Валанциусов".

languages.text: "Officer, gather the troops. Today the Drivestems will go down in history as the only house to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}come to the defence of Dargonus and the von Valancius{/d}."
languages.original_text: "Офицер, соберите людей. Сегодня Драйвстемы войдут в историю как единственный род, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}вставший на защиту Даргонуса и фон Валанциусов{/d}".

traits.locale_text: "Officer, gather the troops. Today the Drivestems will go down in history as the only house to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}come to the defence of Dargonus and the von Valancius{/d}."
"Officer, gather the troops. Today the Drivestems will go down in history as the only house to come to the defence of Dargonus and the von Valancius."
"Officer, gather the troops. Today the Drivestems will go down in history as the only house to come to the defence of Dargonus and the von Valancius."

languages.text: “军官，集合部队。今日，德莱夫斯塔将作为唯一挺身而出{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}保卫达戈努斯{/d}和冯·瓦兰修斯的家族，被载入史册。”
languages.original_text: "Officer, gather the troops. Today the Drivestems will go down in history as the only house to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}come to the defence of Dargonus and the von Valancius{/d}."

traits.locale_text: “军官，集合部队。今日，德莱夫斯塔将作为唯一挺身而出{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}保卫达戈努斯{/d}和冯·瓦兰修斯的家族，被载入史册。”

languages.text: « Officier, rassemblez les troupes. Aujourd'hui, les Drivestem vont passer à la postérité en tant que seule maison à avoir {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}volé au secours de Dargonus et des von Valancius{/d}. »
languages.original_text: "Officer, gather the troops. Today the Drivestems will go down in history as the only house to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}come to the defence of Dargonus and the von Valancius{/d}."

traits.locale_text: « Officier, rassemblez les troupes. Aujourd'hui, les Drivestem vont passer à la postérité en tant que seule maison à avoir {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}volé au secours de Dargonus et des von Valancius{/d}. »

languages.text: "Subay, birlikleri topla. Bugün Drivestemler, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}Dargonus'u ve von Valanciusları savunmaya gelen{/d} tek hane olarak tarihe geçecek."
languages.original_text: "Officer, gather the troops. Today the Drivestems will go down in history as the only house to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}come to the defence of Dargonus and the von Valancius{/d}."

traits.locale_text: "Subay, birlikleri topla. Bugün Drivestemler, {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}Dargonus'u ve von Valanciusları savunmaya gelen{/d} tek hane olarak tarihe geçecek."

languages.text: «Oficial, reúna a las tropas. Hoy, los Drivestem quedarán grabados en la historia como la única casa que {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}acudió en defensa de Dargonus y von Valancius{/d}».
languages.original_text: "Officer, gather the troops. Today the Drivestems will go down in history as the only house to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}come to the defence of Dargonus and the von Valancius{/d}."

traits.locale_text: «Oficial, reúna a las tropas. Hoy, los Drivestem quedarán grabados en la historia como la única casa que {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}acudió en defensa de Dargonus y von Valancius{/d}».

languages.text: "Offizier, sammelt die Truppen. Heute werden die Drivestems als einziges Haus in die Geschichte eingehen, das {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}Dargonus und dem Haus derer von Valancius zu Hilfe eilte{/d}."
languages.original_text: "Officer, gather the troops. Today the Drivestems will go down in history as the only house to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}come to the defence of Dargonus and the von Valancius{/d}."

traits.locale_text: "Offizier, sammelt die Truppen. Heute werden die Drivestems als einziges Haus in die Geschichte eingehen, das {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}Dargonus und dem Haus derer von Valancius zu Hilfe eilte{/d}."

languages.text: 「兵士たち、集まれ。今日、ドライブステム家は、{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}ダゴラスとフォン・ヴァランキウスを助ける{/d}唯一の家として歴史に名を刻むだろう。」
languages.original_text: "Officer, gather the troops. Today the Drivestems will go down in history as the only house to {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}come to the defence of Dargonus and the von Valancius{/d}."

traits.locale_text: 「兵士たち、集まれ。今日、ドライブステム家は、{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_KamillaTraitor}ダゴラスとフォン・ヴァランキウスを助ける{/d}唯一の家として歴史に名を刻むだろう。」
